name: Krechet-94
tagline: The Soviet lunar suit that never flew — its DNA lives in every Orlan and Feitian
description: Soviet lunar surface suit developed for the cancelled N1/L3 crewed lunar program. Single-piece rear-entry design with the PLSS built into the back hatch — the architectural pattern that later became Orlan and Feitian. Krechet hardware survived the program's cancellation and lives in museum collections (notably the Memorial Museum of Cosmonautics, Moscow). Name means "gyrfalcon" — the largest of the Falcon birds.
best_known_for: The Soviet lunar suit that never reached the Moon — its rear-entry architecture became the DNA of every Russian and Chinese EVA suit since
